title: Pyrex Round Shape with lid, 1,6 Liter, Transparent, 155P001
features: Type : Glass Baking Bowl ,Oven Bowl ,Storage Bowl
Extra resistant to sudden changes in temperature: -40 °C to +300 °C
Oven, microwave, refrigerator, freezer and dishwasher safe
description: From the oven to the freezer and vice versa, without any risk. To optimally plan meals of a busy week or freeze leftovers, Pyrex Cook & Freeze has developed a range of borosilicate glass oven moulds that are highly resistant to thermal shocks and allow you to safely transport your dishes from freezer to oven and oven to freezer. Cook & Freeze withstands temperature fluctuations of up to 220°. Its straightforward design without handles allows for optimal storage in the freezer. Key Features: - Clever BPA-free lid for storing in the fridge and freezer. - Stackable and interlocking for space-saving storage, both in the kitchen cabinet, freezer and fridge. Since its establishment in 1915, the Pyrex brand has always anticipated expectations and developments in households, giving families new ideas for preparing, cooking, serving at the table and much more over the years. Thanks to continuous innovation, Pyrex products have become preferred kitchen partners, helping millions of households cook successfully and enjoyably. Today, the Pyrex brand reinvents itself (with a new look). This redesign starts today with you, in your kitchen, with healthy and fresh products. An invitation to create your own recipe. Pyrex is a properly registered trademark of Corning Incorporated and is distributed under license by International Cookware. The Pyrex brand owes its reputation in the French manufacturing industry to the production of borosilicate glass since 1922. In October 2017, the brand received the quality label "Origine France" for all its pressed borosilicate glass products. The advantages of Pyrex borosilicate glass: - Withstands extreme temperatures from -40°C to + 300°C - Temperature shock resistant up to 220°C: can be directly from the -20°C cold freezer into the 200°C hot oven - Low-emission, BPA-free and hygienic material that does not absorb dirt or odours - Scratch-resistant.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher, store in refrigerator or freezer, use in oven.
